name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_sht_uvw_ai1
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_sht' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_ai1' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`Created_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Completed` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Completed_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Completed_User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Scheduled_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Due_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Early_Start_Date` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`Created_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Completed` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Completed_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Completed_User` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Scheduled_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Due_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Early_Start_Date` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'Created_Date|Completed|Completed_Date|Completed_User|Scheduled_Date|Due_Date|Early_Start_Date' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_sht`.`uvw_ai1`
